format:
(UINT8) ID (0x4B)
(UINT8[30]) Force 1 Name
(UINT8[30]) Force 2 Name
(UINT8[30]) Force 3 Name
(UINT8[30]) Force 4 Name
remarks_html:
Packet CLS 1.

This is only sent by the host to joining players, in Use Map Settings games, so they can display the name of the teams before they have downloaded the map.
Each block of 30 bytes is infact a null-terminated string.
